According to the recommendations of the 15th Central Finance Commission, the Ministry of Panchayati Raj, Government of India, had withheld funds of certain Rural Local Self-Government Institutions due to the appointment of administrators. Among those institutions where elections have now been conducted and people-elected representatives have been appointed, the untied funds of the first and second installments amounting to 151.1856 crores are to be distributed to such Rural Local Self-Government Institutions.
